data.name: Futanari Sex Adventures - Episode 5
data.detailed_description:
This adult visual novel series features a stunning red-haired futanari as the protagonist. In this episode, Kira and Evelyn find themselves both locked up in county jail.

GAME DESCRIPTION

After helping Kira escape from a wild sex party that the police crashed, Evelyn and her girlfriend find themselves locked up in county jail.

After a few hours without sleep, the tension between them is high, especially since Evelyn is really mad that Kira went out without telling her.

As they navigate the cramped cell and its basic amenities - a shared toilet and little privacy - the two begin to reconnect and flirt again.

But will Evelyn eventually report to the officer that it was Kira’s fault? Or will she seek revenge in some other way?

Play our game to find out!

FEATURES

- HD renders

- Image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
